title: laelia × tlaxiacoensis
intro: Laelia × tlaxiacoensis, also known as the Tlaxiaco Laelia, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Laelia genus, a group of orchids native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Laelia × tlaxiacoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Laelia × tlaxiacoensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its flowers or leaves in hot water, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
